case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1,422.00 U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1,422.00 U.S. CURRENCY; $3,000.00 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF OF PAMELA A. UNDERWOOD REGARDING STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE CALIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1422.00 U.S. CURRENCY; $3,000.00 U.S. CURRENCY PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11470 ET SEQ. AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11489. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER RELEASING PROPERTY PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE SECTION 1536
